class.name: E3DModel
class.brief_description: Resource representing a MaSzyna E3D model
class.description: [E3DModel] is a Godot-native resource that stores the complete hierarchical structure of a MaSzyna [code].e3d[/code] model. It acts as a container for the root [E3DSubModel] components. For detailed info please check official E3D documentation: https://wiki.eu07.pl/index.php/Format_E3D

method.name: get_node
method.description: Finds and returns E3DSubModel by NodePath

method.name: get_node_or_null
method.description: Finds and returns E3DSubModel by NodePath. Returns null without an error, when not found.

members.member: A list of top-level [E3DSubModel] resources that form the root of the model's hierarchy.

constants.constant: Version of the serialized E3D model cache format.
